english translation text: Aake Rasiyon Se, Sakina Ko, Chhuralo BabaO Baba, come and free me from these chainsEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
Aake Rasiyon Se, Sakina Ko, Chhuralo BabaMai Hun Mushkil Me Mujhe Paas Bulaalo Baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Baba, come and free me from these chains,
I am surrounded by difficulties, please call me to you O Baba,

urdu transliteration text:
Bhaagte Unth Se, Baba Mai Kayyi Baar GirriDurr Bhi Cheenay Mere De-kho Meri Poshak JalliMujhko Zindaan Ke, Andhero Se, Nikaalo Baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
O Baba, many times have I fallen off a running camel,
My earings were snatched, and my clothes were burnt,
O Baba, take me out of the darkness of this prison

urdu transliteration text:
Neend Aati Nahi, Sone Se Bhi Darr Lagta HaiLoon Jo Karwat To Mere, Kaano Se Khoon Rista HaiApne Seene Pe, Gharri Pal To, Sulaalo Baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
I am unable to sleep, I am even afraid of sleeping,
My ear bleeds when I turn my side,
For a little while please let me sleep on your chest

urdu transliteration text:
Shimr Se Maangoon Jo, Paani To Jhirak Deta HaiPhir Mere Saamne Ma-tti Pe Giraa Deta HaiBhej Ke Ghazi Ko, Do Ghoont, Mangaalo Baba
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Shimr sneers at me when I ask him for water,
In front of me he spills water on the ground,
O Baba, please send my uncle to fetch some water taunt

Your killers don’t allow me to cry for you,
Take me with you on your spear so I can cry without fear

No calls me by my name,
People of Shaam call me an orphan,

They pull my hair, and they slap me,
They laugh while looking at the head of Abbas (a.s.),
